---
title: "Bibliography"
format: html
bibliography:
  journal: assets/bib/cv_journals.bib
  conference: assets/bib/cv_proceedings.bib
  talk: assets/bib/cv_talks.bib
  poster: assets/bib/cv_posters.bib
  preprint: assets/bib/cv_preprints.bib
csl: https://www.zotero.org/styles/apa
nocite: "@*"
resources:
  - assets/bib/cv_journals.bib
  - assets/bib/cv_proceedings.bib
  - assets/bib/cv_talks.bib
  - assets/bib/cv_posters.bib
  - assets/bib/cv_preprints.bib
---

## Articles

::: {#refs-journal}
:::

## Conferences

::: {#refs-conference}
:::

## Talks

::: {#refs-talk}
:::

## Posters

::: {#refs-poster}
:::

## Preprints

::: {#refs-preprint}
:::

cv_journals.bib cv_posters.bib cv_preprints.bib cv_proceedings.bib cv_talks.bib
cv-conference.bib cv-journal.bib cv-poster.bib cv-preprint.bib cv-talk.bib
